name: Gunda Badrinadh
resumeText:
Gunda Badrinadh
+91-9493051600 | Gundabadrinadh@gmail.com
Suryapet, Telangana – 508213
Professional Summary
AI ML-focused Computer Science student with hands-on experience in computer vision, automation, and
dataset engineering. Passionate about building intelligent systems and scalable AI solutions. Seeking
opportunities in AI Engineering / Software Development roles where I can contribute to real-world problem
solving.
Education
•
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML)2022 – 2026
Anurag Engineering College, KodadCGPA: 8.18
Personal Projects
•
Gesture-Controlled PowerPoint Presentation System
Computer vision-based system to control presentation slides using hand gestures.
– Implemented real-time hand gesture detection to map gestures to slide navigation actions.
– Integrated gesture recognition logic with system-level automation for presentation control.
– Tested system responsiveness and accuracy under varying conditions.
– Prepared functional documentation outlining gesture mapping and execution flow.
•
Text-to-Speech Synthesizer
Web-based text-to-speech converter implemented using JavaScript APIs.
– Improved accessibility by enabling audio output for on-screen text.
– Enhanced usability for learning and content-consumption applications.
– Technologies used: HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
•
Automated File Organisation and Data Visualization
Python-based automation system to categorize multimedia files by type.
– Organized files into structured folders to improve data retrieval and management.
– Applied basic machine learning logic for file classification.
– Technologies used: Python, ML algorithms.
Experience
•
AI Creators InternshipAug 2024
AICTE – Swecha
– Supported AI dataset development through structured collection and processing of real-world audio and video
data.
– Followed defined standards to ensure data quality and consistency for speech and vision-based model training.
– Assisted in data validation to support model accuracy.
– Maintained documentation related to data sources and collection procedures.
Technical Skills
Programming Languages: C, Python, Java, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3
Development Tools: VS Code, Git, GitHub
Technical Concepts: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Machine Learning, Web APIs
Libraries & Frameworks: Python Libraries (pandas, scikit-learn, NumPy), JavaScript Libraries
Core Competencies: Algorithm Design, Code Optimization, System Design, Problem Solving, Software
Development
Languages Known: English, Telugu
Activities and Volunteering
•
NSS Volunteer – Conducted structured field surveys to document feedback on government scheme utilization.
•
Blood Donation Camp Volunteer – Assisted in coordination with a district government hospital.
•
Attended Workshop on Drone Technology (Nov 2024).

name: john
resumeText:
CHARLES MCTURLAND

September 2015 - April 2019
Pittsburgh, PA
SKILLS
Python
Java
SQL
REST API Development
Analytical Problem Solving
Technical Documentation
Agile Development Practices
WORK EXPERIENCE
Software Engineer
Embark
January 2022 - current/New York, NY
Architected backend services supporting vehicle logistics workflows,
enabling dispatch systems to process ~12k shipment events per day
with reliable status synchronization.
Optimized route-planning queries in a microservices environment using
Python and PostgreSQL, reducing average API response time by 38%
during peak operations.
Implemented automated validation checks across shipment ingestion
pipelines, improving operational data accuracy across 5 core internal
systems used by dispatch teams.
Partnered with product and operations stakeholders to ship incremental
platform releases on a bi-weekly cadence, accelerating delivery of new
carrier integration features.
Software Engineer
MarketSmart
April 2019 - January 2022/Washington, DC
Developed new lead-scoring features for a marketing analytics platform,
increasing predictive model precision by 21% for donor engagement
campaigns.
Refactored legacy data processing modules into modular services,
decreasing average batch processing time by 17 minutes per run.
Integrated REST APIs connecting CRM systems and campaign analytics
tools, supporting data exchange across 3 enterprise client platforms.
Collaborated with data science and product teams to deploy
experimentation pipelines that supported dozens of A/B campaign tests
annually.
Software Engineer Intern
Marketing Science Company
April 2018 - March 2019/Pittsburgh, PA
Built internal dashboards to visualize campaign performance metrics,
enabling analysts to monitor 150+ active advertising experiments.
Automated recurring data preparation tasks in Python, reducing manual
analyst workload by ~6 hours per week.
Investigated anomalies in digital campaign reporting pipelines, resolving
discrepancies affecting three client reporting workflows.
Documented ETL processes and onboarding guides that shortened
ramp-up time for incoming interns by one training session.

name: abhi
resumeText:
Gunda Badrinadh
Suryapet, Telangana, India
+91-9493051600  —  Gundabadrinadh@gmail.com
Professional Summary
Computer Science (AI & ML) undergraduate with strong interest in embedded intelligence, human–machine inter-
faces, and edge computing systems.  Experience in computer vision, signal-oriented data processing, and real-world
sensor  data  pipelines.   Motivated  to  contribute  to  semiconductor-driven  intelligent  hardware  systems  and  next-
generation computing platforms.
Education
B.Tech – Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML)2022–2026
Anurag Engineering College, Kodad
CGPA: 8.18
Semiconductor-Relevant Projects
Gesture-Controlled Human–Computer Interface for Presentation Systems
•  Designed a vision-based gesture interface enabling touch-free slide navigation using camera input.
•  Implemented real-time hand-gesture detection pipeline mapped to system-level control commands.
•  Optimized response latency for interactive control scenarios and usability.
•  Documented gesture-to-command execution architecture for system integration.
Automated File Classification and Data Processing System
•  Built Python-based automated multimedia classification and structured storage system.
•  Applied machine learning techniques for content-type detection and categorization.
•  Implemented efficient data organization workflows improving retrieval efficiency.
Experience
AI Creators Internship – Swecha (AICTE)Aug 2024
•  Collected and curated structured audio–visual datasets following defined acquisition protocols.
•  Ensured data quality and consistency for vision and speech model training pipelines.
•  Performed dataset validation and documentation of data collection workflows.
•  Supported preparation of sensor-like data for AI system development.
Technical Skills
Programming:  C, Python, Java
Core Concepts:  Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Machine Learning Basics, Com-
puter Vision, Signal-oriented Data Processing, Human–Computer Interaction
Tools:  Git, GitHub, VS Code
Libraries:  NumPy, pandas, scikit-learn
Technical Interests
Embedded  AI  Systems,  Edge  Computing,  Human–Machine  Interfaces,  Intelligent  Hardware  Systems,  Computer
Vision at Edge Devices
